common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.disclaimer: Wakeela does not provide legal advice and is not a law firm. Platform flags are informational only and do not constitute legal findings of negligence.

splash.title: WAKEELA
splash.headline: Your personal legal shield.
splash.subheadline: Full transparency. Timestamped proof. Client rights protection.
splash.regionNote: Your data is stored in your chosen region to comply with local privacy laws.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Wakeela account
auth.registerSubtitle: Start protecting your legal rights today
auth.consentLabel: I agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service. I consent to processing of my personal data in accordance with UAE PDPL / Saudi PDPL / GDPR.
auth.consentRequired: You must accept the privacy terms to create an account.

register.roleClientDesc: I need to track and manage my legal case
register.roleLawyerDesc: My client invited me to collaborate on a case

dashboard.title: My Cases
dashboard.subtitle: Track, protect, and manage all your legal matters.
dashboard.noCasesDesc: Start by creating your first case. Wakeela will track deadlines, documents, and lawyer activity for you.

wizard.title: New Case
wizard.subtitle: Tell us about your case — takes under 8 minutes.
wizard.step1Title: What type of case is this?
wizard.step1Subtitle: Select the category that best describes your legal matter.
wizard.caseTypeEmploymentDesc: Labour disputes, termination, unpaid wages, visa issues
wizard.caseTypePropertyDesc: Real estate, rental, RERA, DLD disputes
wizard.caseTypeCriminalDesc: Criminal charges, police matters, public prosecution
wizard.caseTypeOtherDesc: Any other legal matter not listed above
wizard.caseTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Wrongful termination at ABC Company
wizard.caseTitleHint: Give your case a clear, descriptive name.
wizard.step2Title: Where is your case being heard?
wizard.step2Subtitle: Select the jurisdiction and city handling your matter.
wizard.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the case — background, key facts, desired outcome.
wizard.descriptionHint: For your records only. Wakeela does not share this with anyone.
wizard.step3Subtitle: Add their details for activity tracking. Completely optional.
wizard.noLawyerYet: I don’t have a lawyer yet
wizard.noLawyerDesc: You can track the case yourself and add a lawyer later.
wizard.step4Subtitle: Add upcoming court dates or submission deadlines. You can add more later.
wizard.step5Subtitle: Contracts, notices, letters, court orders — anything relevant. Fully optional.
wizard.uploadDrop: Drop files here or click to browse
wizard.uploadHint: PDF, JPG, PNG up to 50 MB each — SHA-256 fingerprinted

nde.inactivityDesc: No update or document upload for {days} days
nde.deadlineMissDesc: A court or submission deadline has passed without a completion action logged
nde.extendedSilenceDesc: No activity of any kind for {days} consecutive days

legal.notLegalAdvice: Wakeela does not provide legal advice and is not a law firm.
legal.informationalOnly: Platform flags are informational only and do not constitute legal findings of negligence.
legal.consultProfessional: Always consult a licensed legal professional for legal decisions.

tracker.title: Deadlines & Court Dates
tracker.subtitle: Track every important date across all your cases.
tracker.noDeadlinesDesc: Add your first deadline to start tracking important dates.

addForm.title: Deadline title
addForm.channelNote: WhatsApp reminders require a phone number in your profile.

nde_alerts.title: Alerts
nde_alerts.subtitle: Negligence detection flags across all your active cases.
nde_alerts.disclaimer: These flags identify observable inactivity patterns only. They are informational and do not constitute legal findings of negligence. Always consult a licensed legal professional.
nde_alerts.noAlertsDesc: All your cases are up to date. Wakeela checks every 6 hours.

rule1.name: Lawyer Inactivity
rule1.description: No lawyer update or document upload for {days} days on an active case.
rule1.action: Send your lawyer a reminder to update the case.

rule2.name: Missed Deadline
rule2.description: A court or submission deadline passed without a completion action logged.
rule2.action: Review the missed deadline and consider escalating.

rule3.name: Extended Silence
rule3.description: No activity of any kind for {days} consecutive days.
rule3.action: Contact your lawyer immediately or use the Escalation Toolkit.

banner.critical: Critical: Extended silence on this case — escalation recommended.
banner.high: Action required: A deadline has been missed on this case.
banner.medium: Attention: No lawyer activity detected for {days} days.

lawyer.noCasesDesc: When a client invites you and you accept, the case will appear here.
lawyer.inviteLinkReady: Link generated! Share it with your lawyer.
lawyer.inviteUsedDesc: This invite has already been accepted.
lawyer.inviteExpiredDesc: This invite has expired. Ask the client to generate a new one.
lawyer.scopedAccess: By accepting, you get scoped access to this case only.
lawyer.performanceDisclaimer: Score is based on logged activity in Wakeela. Not a legal assessment.
lawyer.chatNoMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
lawyer.secureChatDesc: Secure channel between client and lawyer

billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan and features.
billing.freeDesc: Free plan — no credit card required
billing.hyperpayDesc: Pay in SAR or AED via HyperPay (Mada, KNET, local cards). Coming in the next release.
billing.envNote: To enable payments: add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_PRICE_* env vars in Vercel Settings
billing.successDesc: Welcome to the {tier} plan. All features are now unlocked.
billing.canceled: Payment was canceled. No charges were made.

escalation.title: Escalation Toolkit
escalation.subtitle: Legal escalation letter templates
escalation.upgradeRequired: This template requires a Pro plan or higher.
escalation.lockedDesc: Legal letter templates are available on the Pro plan and above.
escalation.disclaimer: Templates are for documentation purposes only. Wakeela does not provide legal advice.

invite.title: Invite a Lawyer
invite.description: Generate a secure link to invite a lawyer to this case. They will get scoped read/write access.
invite.email_hint: If provided, shown on the invite acceptance page.
invite.expiry_note: Valid for {days} days — single use only
invite.accept_scope: By accepting, you get scoped access to this case only.
invite.error_invalid_desc: This invite link is invalid or does not exist.
invite.error_expired_desc: This invite has expired. Ask the client to generate a new link.
invite.error_revoked_desc: This invite has been revoked by the client.
invite.error_used_desc: This invite has already been accepted.
invite.error_self_desc: You cannot accept an invite you created.

onboarding.disclaimer: Wakeela does not provide legal advice
onboarding.wa_welcome: Your Wakeela account is ready. Need help setting up your case?
onboarding.wa_nudge: Most users start by adding their case. It takes less than 1 minute.
